evals.prompt: Implement this paper into a citation-anchored PyTorch scaffold: https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762
evals.expected_output: Accepts an arXiv URL, runs the five-stage paper2code workflow, and produces a minimal implementation with ambiguity notes.

evals.prompt: 我已经把论文下好了，路径是 ./papers/industrial-routing.pdf。请直接基于这个本地 PDF 做 paper2code，不要查 DOI。
evals.expected_output: Accepts a local PDF path, extracts the paper text locally, and continues the standard paper2code workflow without requiring network metadata.

evals.prompt: Please turn this OpenReview paper into code: https://openreview.net/forum?id=H4DqfPSibmx
evals.expected_output: Accepts an OpenReview forum page, resolves the PDF, mines page metadata, and produces the standard paper2code output scaffold.
Accepts an OpenReview direct PDF URL and produces the educational variant with extra explanatory comments and walkthrough support.
